headline: Comcast Bets On Bilingual World Cup Coverage To Deepen Xfinity Engagement
summary: Comcast is preparing extensive bilingual coverage for the 2026 FIFA World Cup across its Xfinity platforms. The company plans to integrate FOX Sports and Telemundo streams with features such as RealTime4K, Multiview, and AI-powered highlights. FOX One will launch on Xumo Stream Box, aligning English and Spanish content in a single streaming hub. For investors watching NasdaqGS:CMCSA, this World Cup effort comes as the stock trades around $24.5 and has been under pressure, with the share...
